scope_goal: Preserve legacy run provenance manifests in the engine run lifecycle so recovered provenance and retrieval evidence stay deterministic and auditable across legacy replay paths.
scope_completed: Updated `src/qual/engine/run_pipeline.py` in reviewed source commit `d59e853efa72e14488e62d9487010ba61e335a55` so `EngineRunFlowResult.to_manifest()` backfills `run_provenance` from legacy flow manifests or snapshots, synthesizes provenance when only the run record is available, and carries `retrieval_evidence` through serialized run manifests.

Extended `tests/unit/test_engine_run_pipeline.py` to assert provenance-only legacy manifests preserve `retrieval_evidence`, keep `run_provenance` aligned, and continue producing a stable run-flow manifest digest.

The docs-only sync commits `c46f8eb28a289e9f1138ca7b349ebc3d415a9c86` and later packet-refresh commits keep the handoff packet SHA aligned with the reviewed implementation; they do not change engine scope.
kickoff_budget_note: This packet stays on the current Milestone 3 engine-run loop and audit/provenance handling. Later handoff-maintenance edits remain metadata-only and do not widen the engine scope.
approved_exception_note: Approved shared handoff-maintenance artifacts are recorded in the companion shared packet `.codex/kickoff_packets/feat-engine-runs.shared.md`.
tasks_completed: Preserved legacy run provenance manifests in `EngineRunFlowResult.to_manifest()` so recovered provenance and retrieval evidence survive legacy replay paths.
Kept synthesized `run_flow_manifest` output aligned with recovered provenance for provenance-only rehydration.
Added regression coverage in `tests/unit/test_engine_run_pipeline.py` for provenance-only manifest synthesis and `retrieval_evidence` preservation.
Kept the handoff metadata synchronized with the docs-only packet SHA sync commits without widening engine scope.
roadmap_items: Milestone 3: Real workflow loop - expose canonical engine state models and plan/draft/revise/apply-reject through the canonical app service.
Milestone 3: Real workflow loop - feat-engine-runs: plan/draft/revise/apply-reject workflow actions.
Milestone 4: Dogfooding readiness - finish persistence and audit hooks needed for real writing sessions.
metadata_only_note: The current branch tip is a packet-refresh commit. Review the engine-run implementation at `d59e853efa72e14488e62d9487010ba61e335a55`; later handoff-maintenance commits remain metadata-only unless this packet is regenerated.
